descriptions.en: Tirocinante social security advice – paid training, Homeoffice possible Lateral income in Finance & Security consultancy – without selling insurance products. Focus on 3a/3b, investment plans/ ETFs, social security funds and budgeting. Key points: - Organization: Convit International GmbH - Location: Agno, Switzerland (TI) · Homeoffice/hybrid possible - Contract: Undetermined time · Grade: 10–100 % · Language: IT (B2+) - Salario: CHF 1500–7500/month OTE (fix + bonus; based on degree & performance) - Contact: Recruiting@convit.ch Free VBV Formation: - VBV Formation included and free of charge; after the route you get the VBV certification. - Also suitable for career/side entrance changes (without experience). Responsibility: - Advice to private customers/ SMEs on social security, savings and 3a/3b solutions (without insurance). - Analysis of needs, creation of financial concepts and follow-up in CRM. - Online appointments and in presence; pipeline management and recommendations. Profile: - Customer orientation, clear communication, commercial attitude and desire to learn. - Preferable experience for sale/services; not obligatory. We offer: - Remunerated internal training, continuous mentoring, modern tools and strong backoffice. - Oral flexibility, Homeoffice/hybrid, clear career path (Junior → Senior → Teamlead). - Incentives: 5‐star annual trip for Top Performer. Requisite Grenzgänger (frontier): - Mandatory permit G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) for frontier candidates residing in Italy. - We do not consider applications without status of Grenzgänger (allowed G). Application: Send the question online – quick answer. Note: No sale of insurance products.
descriptions.de: Tirocinante Sozialversicherungsberatung – bezahlte Ausbildung, Homeoffice möglich Lateraleinkommen in Finanz- und Sicherheitsberatung – ohne Verkauf von Versicherungsprodukten. Erforderliche Grenzgänger (Front): - Mandatäre Genehmigung G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) für Grenzanwärter mit Wohnsitz in Italien. - Wir betrachten keine Anträge ohne Status von Grenzgänger (erlaubt G). descriptions.it:
Consulente privati pianificazione finanziaria (junior) orari flessibili

Entrata laterale nella consulenza Finanza & Previdenza – senza vendita di prodotti assicurativi. Focus su 3a/3b, piani d'investimento/ETF, fondi previdenziali e budgeting.

Punti chiave:

- Organizzazione: Convit International GmbH

- Sede: Comano, Svizzera (TI) · Homeoffice/ibrido possibile

- Contratto: Tempo indeterminato · Grado: 10–100 % · Lingua: IT (B2+)

- Salario: CHF 1500–7500/mese OTE (fisso + bonus; in base a grado & performance)

- Contatto: Recruiting@convit.ch

Formazione VBV gratuita:

- Formazione VBV inclusa e gratuita; dopo il percorso ottieni la certificazione VBV.

- Adatto anche a cambi di carriera/entrata laterale (senza esperienza).

Responsabilità:

- Consulenza a clienti privati/PMI su previdenza, risparmio & soluzioni 3a/3b (senza assicurazioni).

- Analisi bisogni, creazione concetti finanziari e follow‑up in CRM.

- Appuntamenti online e in presenza; gestione pipeline e raccomandazioni.

Profilo:

- Orientamento al cliente, comunicazione chiara, attitudine commerciale e voglia di imparare.

- Preferibile esperienza in vendita/servizio; non obbligatoria.

Offriamo:

- Formazione interna retribuita, mentoring continuo, strumenti moderni e forte backoffice.

- Flessibilità oraria, Homeoffice/ibrido, percorso di carriera chiaro (Junior → Senior → Teamlead).

- Incentivi: viaggio annuale 5‑stelle per Top Performer.

Requisito Grenzgänger (frontalieri):

- Obbligatorio permesso G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) per candidati frontalieri che risiedono in Italia.

- Non consideriamo candidature senza status di Grenzgänger (permesso G).

Candidatura: Invia la domanda online – risposta rapida.

Nota: Nessuna vendita di prodotti assicurativi.
descriptions.en: Private financial planning consultant (junior) flexible hours Lateral entry into Finance & Pension consultancy - without selling insurance products. Focus on 3a/3b, investment plans/ETFs, provident funds and budgeting. Key points: - Organization: Convit International GmbH - Location: Comano, Switzerland (TI) · Homeoffice/hybrid possible - Contract: Permanent · Grade: 10–100 % · Language: IT (B2+) - Salary: CHF 1500–7500/month OTE (fixed + bonus; dependent on grade & performance) - Contact: Recruiting@convit.ch Free VBV training: - VBV training included and free; after the course you obtain the VBV certification. - Also suitable for career changes/lateral entry (without experience). Responsibilities: - Advice to private/SME clients on pensions, savings & 3a/3b solutions (without insurance). - Needs analysis, creation of financial concepts and follow-up in CRM. - Online and in-person appointments; pipeline management and recommendations. Profile: - Customer orientation, clear communication, commercial attitude and desire to learn. - Sales/service experience preferred; not mandatory. We offer: - Paid internal training, ongoing mentoring, modern tools and strong backoffice. - Flexible hours, Homeoffice/hybrid, clear career path (Junior → Senior → Teamlead). - Incentives: 5-star annual trip for Top Performers. Grenzgänger requirement (cross-border workers): - Mandatory G permit (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) for cross-border workers who reside in Italy. - We do not consider applications without Grenzgänger status (G permit). Apply: Apply online – quick response. Note: No sales of insurance products.
descriptions.de: Privater Finanzplanungsberater (Junior) mit flexiblen Arbeitszeiten. Quereinstieg in die Finanz- und Vorsorgeberatung – ohne Verkauf von Versicherungsprodukten. Schwerpunkte sind 3a/3b, Anlagepläne/ETFs, Vorsorgefonds und Budgetierung. Kernpunkte: - Organisation: Convit International GmbH - Standort: Comano, Schweiz (TI) · Homeoffice/Hybrid möglich - Vertrag: Unbefristet · Note: 10–100 % · Sprache: IT (B2+) - Gehalt: CHF 1500–7500/Monat OTE (Fix + Bonus; abhängig von Note & Leistung) - Kontakt: Recruiting@convit.ch Kostenlose VBV-Schulung: - VBV-Schulung inklusive und kostenlos; Nach dem Kurs erhalten Sie die VBV-Zertifizierung. - Auch für Berufswechsel/Quereinstieg (ohne Erfahrung) geeignet. Aufgaben: - Beratung von Privat-/KMU-Kunden zu Vorsorge, Sparen & 3a/3b-Lösungen (ohne Versicherung). - Bedarfsanalyse, Erstellung von Finanzkonzepten und Nachbereitung im CRM. - Online- und persönliche Termine; Pipeline-Management und Empfehlungen. Profil: - Kundenorientierung, klare Kommunikation, kaufmännische Einstellung und Lernbereitschaft. - Vertriebs-/Serviceerfahrung bevorzugt; nicht erforderlich. Wir bieten: - Bezahlte interne Schulungen, fortlaufendes Mentoring, moderne Tools und ein starkes Backoffice. - Flexible Arbeitszeiten, Homeoffice/Hybrid, klarer Karriereweg (Junior → Senior → Teamlead). - Incentives: 5-Sterne-Jahresreise für Top-Performer. Grenzgänger-Anforderung (Grenzgänger): - Obligatorische G-Genehmigung (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) für Grenzgänger mit Wohnsitz in Italien. - Bewerbungen ohne Grenzgängerstatus (Ausweis G) werden von uns nicht berücksichtigt. descriptions.fr: Consultant en planification financière privée (junior) horaires flexibles Entrée latérale dans le conseil en finance et retraite - sans vendre de produits d'assurance. Responsabilités : - Conseil aux clients privés/PME sur les solutions de retraite, d'épargne et 3a/3b (sans assurance). - Analyse des besoins, création de concepts financiers et suivi en CRM. - Rendez-vous en ligne et en personne; gestion du pipeline et recommandations. Exigence Grenzgänger (travailleurs frontaliers) : - Permis G obligatoire (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) pour les travailleurs frontaliers qui résident en Italie. - Nous ne prenons pas en compte les candidatures sans statut Grenzgänger (permis G). - Obbligatorio permesso G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) per candidati frontalieri che risiedono in Italia.

Punti chiave: - Organizzazione: Convit International GmbH - Sede: Mendrisio-Borgo, Svizzera (TI) · Homeoffice/ibrido possibile - Contratto: Tempo indeterminato · Grado: 10–100 % · Lingua: IT (B2+) - Salario: CHF 1500–7500/mese OTE (fisso + bonus; in base a grado & performance) - Contatto: Recruiting@convit.ch Formazione VBV gratuita: - Formazione VBV inclusa e gratuita; dopo il percorso ottieni la certificazione VBV. - Adatto anche a cambi di carriera/entrata laterale (senza esperienza). Responsabilità: - Consulenza a clienti privati/PMI su previdenza, risparmio & soluzioni 3a/3b (senza assicurazioni). - Analisi bisogni, creazione concetti finanziari e follow‑up in CRM. - Appuntamenti online e in presenza; gestione pipeline e raccomandazioni. Profilo: - Orientamento al cliente, comunicazione chiara, attitudine commerciale e voglia di imparare. - Preferibile esperienza in vendita/servizio; non obbligatoria. Offriamo: - Formazione interna retribuita, mentoring continuo, strumenti moderni e forte backoffice. - Flessibilità oraria, Homeoffice/ibrido, percorso di carriera chiaro (Junior → Senior → Teamlead). - Incentivi: viaggio annuale 5‑stelle per Top Performer. Requisito Grenzgänger (frontalieri): - Obbligatorio permesso G (Grenzgänger-Ausweis) per candidati frontalieri che risiedono in Italia. - Non consideriamo candidature senza status di Grenzgänger (permesso G). Candidatura: Invia la domanda online – risposta rapida. Nota: Nessuna vendita di prodotti assicurativi.
descriptions.en: Convit Holding GmbH is hiring for the Posizione di ingresso consulenza finanziaria formazione pagata role based in Mendrisio-Borgo. Financial and pension consulting in Ticino. Apply through the official Convit careers page.
